title: Universal Material Graph
purpose: Document the Universal Master material graph, its material functions, exposed parameters, validation proof, and portfolio capture targets.

functions.name: MF_NikkiDreamGrade
functions.role: Primary working stylization grade and reference wiring pattern.
functions.portfolioProof: Show input pins, consumed Color/Emissive outputs, and one visible instance variation.

functions.name: MF_Madoka
functions.status: recently repaired, needs final visual proof
functions.portfolioProof: Show exposed tunables, Emissive route, and nonzero glow/radial preview.

functions.name: MF_Itto
functions.role: Crack, spiral, ink, wear, and roughness/height accent layer.
functions.status: recently repaired, needs final visual proof
functions.portfolioProof: Show IttoSpiralIntensity, crack controls, and visible spiral/crack preview.

functions.name: MF_ParallaxCore / MF_RealParallax
functions.role: Height-based UV offset, self-shadowing, and material depth response.
functions.portfolioProof: Show height input, UV offset path, and before/after material surface depth.

functions.name: MF_ColorRampAdvanced
functions.role: Toon banding, palette response, dawn/dusk/night or style-grade transitions.
functions.portfolioProof: Show ramp parameter controls and DayCyclePhase response when wired.

captureTargets: Full graph overview at readable zoom
Function call cluster: Nikki / Madoka / Itto
